# Twilio Notify deprecated

> \[!CAUTION]
>
> Twilio stopped supporting Notify in October 2022.
>
> * If you're starting a new project, [sign up for the Private Beta][beta].
> * If you've already built on Notify, see the [transition guide][transition].

[Programmable Messaging]: /docs/messaging

[transition]: https://help.twilio.com/articles/9198083260571

[beta]: https://airtable.com/appqQFoQmQ9WDS1YW/pag7JpdRtVpox3qhr/form

To migrate to the API replacing Twilio Notify, see the [Bulk Messaging API](/docs/bulk-messaging).
